assumptions: `original_query` satisfies the official user-query trace requirement when `query` is absent.
Diagnostic prompt labels are coverage hints only and are not official gold labels.
The SDK-only rule applies to LLM/model provider calls; Adobe REST API execution stays on the existing API client path.

items.explanation: execute_sql exists and read-only checks block destructive SQL.
items.recommended_fix: Restore DuckDBDatabase.execute_sql, SQLValidator, and destructive SQL blocking.
items.requirement: Implement execute_sql(sql) and keep SQL read-only.

items.explanation: call_api exists and APIValidator/endpoint catalog are present.
items.recommended_fix: Restore AdobeAPIClient.call_api and route all planned API calls through APIValidator.
items.requirement: Implement call_api(method, url, params, headers) with endpoint/API validation.

items.explanation: All top-level final submission deliverables exist.
items.recommended_fix: Run package_submission.py and package_query_outputs.py to regenerate required final-submission artifacts.
items.requirement: Submit system_prompt_template.txt, source_code.zip, final_submission_manifest.json, and final_submission query outputs.

items.recommended_fix: Regenerate package outputs with SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY as the preferred strategy.
items.requirement: Keep packaged default strategy unchanged as SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY.

items.explanation: Checked 73 query directories; missing file records=0.
items.recommended_fix: Regenerate query outputs with package_query_outputs.py and inspect missing query directories.
items.requirement: Each packaged query directory contains metadata.json, filled_system_prompt.txt, and trajectory.json.

items.recommended_fix: Regenerate affected trajectories and preserve original_query, final_answer, tool_call_count, estimated_tokens, runtime, and tool-call steps.
items.requirement: Trajectory JSON is parseable, reproducible, and records query, answer, tool count, tokens, runtime, and SQL/API actions.

items.recommended_fix: Remove or redact secrets and regenerate affected artifacts.
items.requirement: Final submission and trajectory artifacts must not leak secrets.

items.recommended_fix: Rebuild source_code.zip with package_submission.py after excluding unsafe files.
items.requirement: source_code.zip must include source code without .env.local, caches, outputs, generated diagnostic data, or secrets.

items.explanation: No diagnostic or stale output contamination found.
items.recommended_fix: Remove contaminated artifacts from final_submission and update packaging exclusions.
items.requirement: Diagnostic prompts, diagnostic outputs, LLM raw artifacts, caches, and stale duplicate files must not be packaged into final_submission.

items.explanation: Strict/component metrics, hidden-style report, and readiness checks are available.
items.recommended_fix: Regenerate strict eval, hidden-style eval, winner readiness, and readiness reports.
items.requirement: Reports cover SQL correctness, API correctness, response correctness, tool calls, tokens, wall time, hidden-style robustness, and readiness.

items.recommended_fix: Remove model-specific/public-example wording and ensure prompt requires grounded SQL/API evidence.
items.requirement: System prompt should generalize across Claude/OpenAI-style harnesses and avoid public/gold/model-specific runtime assumptions.

items.recommended_fix: Refactor direct LLM HTTP runtime calls to dashagent.llm_client.get_llm_client().
items.requirement: All LLM/model provider calls must use get_llm_client() or LLMClient SDK paths; direct runtime HTTP hits must be zero.

items.recommended_fix: Regenerate the diagnostic suite, preserve diagnostic_only/should_be_scored flags, and keep package exclusions.
items.requirement: Generated prompt suite is diagnostic-only, not official scoring data, and excluded from final submission.

items.recommended_fix: Update README.md and AGENTS.md with workshop-alignment and post-change validation guidance.
items.requirement: README.md and AGENTS.md explain official tools, deliverables, default strategy, validation, diagnostic separation, SDK LLM rule, and no hardcoding/gold-label rules.

items.recommended_fix: Regenerate consolidated reports after adding the Workshop Requirement Alignment section.
items.requirement: report_index.md/json links workshop_requirement_audit.md under Workshop Requirement Alignment.

additional_deliverables.official_requirement: Submit a system prompt template and source-code archive.

call_api(method, url, params, headers).official_requirement: Tool call_api(method, url, params, headers) must make sandbox REST API calls.

diagnostic_prompt_suite_separation.official_requirement: Public examples are illustration/validation only; broader diagnostic prompts must not become official scoring data.

documentation_alignment.official_requirement: Submission should be easy to verify and describe architecture, prompting strategy, evaluation, and safe operation.

evaluation_dimensions.official_requirement: Evaluation covers SQL/API/response correctness plus turns/tool calls/tokens/wall time and trajectory reproducibility.

execute_sql(sql).official_requirement: Tool execute_sql(sql) must execute database SQL.

harness_model_generality.official_requirement: Organizer may run the system prompt with Claude Agent SDK or OpenAI Agents SDK and any model.

per_query_deliverables.official_requirement: For each query submit metadata.json, filled_system_prompt.txt, and trajectory.json.
